meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve no design skills (Advanced Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no design skills. A Advanced-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Antigravity Project Template: Master Design for Freelancers
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with UI. Use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to ship high-end, professional SaaS apps without needing design skills.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity project template eliminates design debt by providing a modular, design-system-first architecture. By pairing it with Claude Code, you automate the implementation of complex layouts, allowing you to focus on business logic while delivering pixel-perfect, high-converting interfaces that impress clients and accelerate your development lifecycle significantly.
content.intro:
The blank canvas is a freelancer's greatest enemy. You have the backend logic mastered, but hours evaporate while you agonize over padding, color theory, and responsive breakpoints. Your clients don't care about your code quality if the UI looks amateur; they want results, and they want them yesterday.

It’s time to stop treating UI as a chore and start treating it as a repeatable system. By leveraging the Antigravity project template, you inherit a battle-tested design framework that handles the heavy lifting, allowing you to deploy professional-grade SaaS architectures in a fraction of the time.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffolding
steps.description: Establish the foundational design system and folder architecture to ensure consistency across all client projects.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the Antigravity base template. Configure the Tailwind CSS integration, design tokens for a professional SaaS aesthetic, and a modular component library structure.

steps.title: Define Domain-Specific Layouts
steps.description: Use Claude Code to generate responsive page layouts based on your specific SaaS requirements.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a responsive dashboard layout component. Include a sidebar navigation, a top-bar user profile, and a main content area using the Antigravity grid system.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate dashboard layout with sidebar and responsive grid'

steps.title: Inject Professional Design Tokens
steps.description: Apply a unified color palette and typography scale that conveys authority and trust to your clients.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Apply the 'Enterprise Blue' theme from the Antigravity library to all components. Ensure high-contrast accessibility standards are met.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'update theme to enterprise-blue and apply accessibility audit'

steps.title: Automate Component Interactivity
steps.description: Implement complex UI states using the template's built-in hooks to ensure a smooth user experience.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a multi-step onboarding form component using Antigravity state management patterns. Include validation feedback and smooth transitions.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create multi-step form component with state management'

steps.title: Final Polish and Responsive Audit
steps.description: Perform a final pass to ensure mobile-first performance and visual perfection across all breakpoints.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the current build for mobile responsiveness. Fix any overflow issues on the dashboard and ensure touch targets meet minimum sizing requirements.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'fix mobile responsive issues and optimize touch targets'

pro_tips: Always define your design tokens in a central JSON file before generating components to ensure global consistency.
Use Claude Code's 'review' flag on every generated component to catch layout regressions before they hit your main branch.
Map your client's brand colors to Antigravity's CSS variables once; it makes theme switching for white-labeling a one-line change.
Leverage the Antigravity 'skeleton' loaders by default to improve perceived performance, a hallmark of senior-level engineering.
Keep your prompt library for Claude Code organized in a repository folder to repeat successful UI patterns across different client projects.
content.next_steps: Once your UI is scaffolded, integrate your backend API endpoints using the same modular component pattern to ensure full-stack velocity.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting design friction slow down your revenue. By mastering the Antigravity workflow, you transition from a coder to a product engine. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
